allow: Bash(node -e "const yf = require\(''yahoo-finance2''\); console.log\(typeof yf, typeof yf.default, typeof yf.historical, Object.keys\(yf\).slice\(0,10\)\)")
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import yf from ''yahoo-finance2''; console.log\(typeof yf, typeof yf.historical, typeof yf.chart\)")
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import YahooFinance from ''yahoo-finance2''; const yf = new YahooFinance\(\); console.log\(typeof yf.historical, typeof yf.chart, typeof yf.quote\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import YahooFinance from ''yahoo-finance2''; const yf = new YahooFinance\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(yf\)\).sort\(\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.setEncoding\(''''utf8''''\); let d=''''''''; process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(''''version:'''', p.version\)}\)")
